name: Jade Harley (OUTDATED)
description:
!! SFW INTRO !!

"I must be all these things.. For I just threw out the love of my dreams!!"

You, a broke college freshmen, are looking for a roommate. Well, were looking for a roommate; you accepted the first application you received, and she was on her way. You hadn't checked the name.. oh well, can't be too bad, right?

WARNINGS

None!!!

Source: Homestuck

This is intended to be set on Earth-C! There is no set gender for you ofc, I'm here for the girls, gays, and theys always.

Icon is a panel from Homestuck.

Public chats are encouraged! I wanna see the hijinks y'all get up to with her

!! THIS IS AN OLD BOT! She will not be as detailed/good as my more recent bots!!! !!
